changeSet.author: P44065
P44065
P44065
P44065
changeSet.sql: insert into au_role_permission(id, role_id, permission) select nextval('au_role_permission_seq'), id, 'PERM_ACCOUNT_USERS_EDIT' from au_role where code = 'operator_admin';

rollback.sql: delete from au_role_permission where role_id in (select id from au_role where code = 'operator_admin') and permission = 'PERM_ACCOUNT_USERS_EDIT';

changeSet.author: P44065
changeSet.sql: insert into au_role_permission(id, role_id, permission) select nextval('au_role_permission_seq'), id, 'PERM_TASK_ASSIGNMENT' from au_role where code in('operator', 'operator_admin', 'consultant_agent');

rollback.sql: delete from au_role_permission where role_id in (select id from au_role where code in('operator', 'operator_admin', 'consultant_agent')) and permission = 'PERM_TASK_ASSIGNMENT';

changeSet.author: P44065

changeSet.sql: insert into au_role_permission(id, role_id, permission) select nextval('au_role_permission_seq'), id, 'PERM_ANNUAL_IMPROVEMENT_REPORT_SUBMIT_VIEW_TASK' from au_role where code in('operator', 'operator_admin', 'consultant_agent');

rollback.sql: delete from au_role_permission where role_id in (select id from au_role where code in('operator', 'operator_admin', 'consultant_agent')) and permission = 'PERM_ANNUAL_IMPROVEMENT_REPORT_SUBMIT_VIEW_TASK';

changeSet.author: P44065
changeSet.sql: insert into au_role_permission(id, role_id, permission) select nextval('au_role_permission_seq'), id, 'PERM_ANNUAL_IMPROVEMENT_REPORT_SUBMIT_EXECUTE_TASK' from au_role where code in('operator', 'operator_admin', 'consultant_agent');

rollback.sql: delete from au_role_permission where role_id in (select id from au_role where code in('operator', 'operator_admin', 'consultant_agent')) and permission = 'PERM_ANNUAL_IMPROVEMENT_REPORT_SUBMIT_EXECUTE_TASK';

changeSet.author: spapagiannakopoulou
changeSet.comment: Populate PERM_VB_USERS_EDIT permission to verifier admin user
changeSet.sql: insert into au_role_permission(id, role_id, permission) select nextval('au_role_permission_seq'), id, 'PERM_VB_USERS_EDIT' from au_role where code = 'verifier_admin';

changeSet.author: spapagiannakopoulou
changeSet.comment: Add PERM_TASK_ASSIGNMENT permission for all VERIFIER roles
changeSet.sql: insert into au_role_permission(id, role_id, permission) select nextval('au_role_permission_seq'), id, 'PERM_TASK_ASSIGNMENT' from au_role where type = 'VERIFIER';

rollback.sql: delete from au_role_permission where role_id in (select id from au_role where type = 'VERIFIER') and permission = 'PERM_TASK_ASSIGNMENT';

changeSet.author: spapagiannakopoulou
changeSet.sql:
insert into au_role_permission(id, role_id, permission) select nextval('au_role_permission_seq'), id, 'PERM_VB_ACCESS_ALL_ACCOUNTS' from au_role where code = 'verifier_admin';
insert into au_authority_permission(id, authority_id, permission) select nextval('au_authority_permission_seq'), id, 'PERM_VB_ACCESS_ALL_ACCOUNTS' from au_authority where code = 'verifier_admin';

rollback.sql:
delete from au_role_permission rp using au_role r where r.id = rp.role_id and r.code = 'verifier_admin' and rp.permission = 'PERM_VB_ACCESS_ALL_ACCOUNTS';
delete from au_authority_permission ap using au_authority a where ap.authority_id = a.id and a.code = 'verifier_admin' and ap.permission = 'PERM_VB_ACCESS_ALL_ACCOUNTS';

changeSet.author: P44065

rollback.sql:
delete from au_role_permission where role_id in (select id from au_role where code in('regulator_admin_team', 'regulator_technical_officer', 'regulator_team_leader', 'ca_super_user', 'service_super_user')) and permission = 'PERM_EMP_NOTIFICATION_REVIEW_VIEW_TASK';
delete from au_role_permission where role_id in (select id from au_role where code in('regulator_technical_officer', 'regulator_team_leader', 'ca_super_user', 'service_super_user')) and permission = 'PERM_EMP_NOTIFICATION_REVIEW_EXECUTE_TASK';

changeSet.author: P44065

rollback.sql:
delete from au_role_permission where role_id in (select id from au_role where code in('regulator_admin_team', 'regulator_technical_officer', 'regulator_team_leader', 'ca_super_user', 'service_super_user')) and permission = 'PERM_EMP_NOTIFICATION_PEER_REVIEW_VIEW_TASK';
delete from au_role_permission where role_id in (select id from au_role where code in('regulator_technical_officer', 'regulator_team_leader', 'ca_super_user', 'service_super_user')) and permission = 'PERM_EMP_NOTIFICATION_PEER_REVIEW_EXECUTE_TASK';

changeSet.author: P44065
changeSet.sql:
insert into au_role_permission(id, role_id, permission) select nextval('au_role_permission_seq'), id, 'PERM_EMP_NOTIFICATION_APPLICATION_SUBMIT_VIEW_TASK' from au_role where code in('operator', 'operator_admin', 'consultant_agent');
insert into au_role_permission(id, role_id, permission) select nextval('au_role_permission_seq'), id, 'PERM_EMP_NOTIFICATION_APPLICATION_SUBMIT_EXECUTE_TASK' from au_role where code in('operator', 'operator_admin', 'consultant_agent');

rollback.sql:
delete from au_role_permission where role_id in (select id from au_role where code in('operator', 'operator_admin', 'consultant_agent')) and permission = 'PERM_EMP_NOTIFICATION_APPLICATION_SUBMIT_VIEW_TASK';
delete from au_role_permission where role_id in (select id from au_role where code in('operator', 'operator_admin', 'consultant_agent')) and permission = 'PERM_EMP_NOTIFICATION_APPLICATION_SUBMIT_EXECUTE_TASK';

changeSet.author: P44065
changeSet.comment: Populate 'PERM_EMP_NOTIFICATION_APPLICATION_SUBMIT_VIEW_TASK' and 'PERM_EMP_NOTIFICATION_APPLICATION_SUBMIT_EXECUTE_TASK' on existing operator users
changeSet.sql:
insert into au_authority_permission(id, authority_id, permission) select nextval('au_authority_permission_seq'), au.id, rp.permission from au_authority au join au_role r on au.code = r.code join au_role_permission rp on r.id = rp.role_id where r.code in('operator', 'operator_admin', 'consultant_agent') and rp.permission = 'PERM_EMP_NOTIFICATION_APPLICATION_SUBMIT_VIEW_TASK';
insert into au_authority_permission(id, authority_id, permission) select nextval('au_authority_permission_seq'), au.id, rp.permission from au_authority au join au_role r on au.code = r.code join au_role_permission rp on r.id = rp.role_id where r.code in('operator', 'operator_admin', 'consultant_agent') and rp.permission = 'PERM_EMP_NOTIFICATION_APPLICATION_SUBMIT_EXECUTE_TASK';

rollback.sql:
delete from au_authority_permission where authority_id in (select au.id from au_authority au join au_role r on au.code = r.code where r.code in('operator', 'operator_admin', 'consultant_agent')) and permission = 'PERM_EMP_NOTIFICATION_APPLICATION_SUBMIT_VIEW_TASK';
delete from au_authority_permission where authority_id in (select au.id from au_authority au join au_role r on au.code = r.code where r.code in('operator', 'operator_admin', 'consultant_agent')) and permission = 'PERM_EMP_NOTIFICATION_APPLICATION_SUBMIT_EXECUTE_TASK';

changeSet.author: P44065
dimopoulosc@unisystems.gr
P44065
changeSet.sql: insert into au_role_permission(id, role_id, permission) select nextval('au_role_permission_seq'), id, 'PERM_AER_APPLICATION_VERIFICATION_VIEW_TASK' from au_role where code in('verifier', 'verifier_admin');

rollback.sql: delete from au_role_permission where role_id in (select id from au_role where code in('verifier', 'verifier_admin')) and permission = 'PERM_AER_APPLICATION_VERIFICATION_VIEW_TASK';

changeSet.author: P44065
changeSet.sql: insert into au_authority_permission(id, authority_id, permission) select nextval('au_authority_permission_seq'), au.id, rp.permission from au_authority au join au_role r on au.code = r.code join au_role_permission rp on r.id = rp.role_id where r.code in('verifier', 'verifier_admin') and rp.permission = 'PERM_AER_APPLICATION_VERIFICATION_VIEW_TASK';

rollback.sql: delete from au_authority_permission where authority_id in (select au.id from au_authority au join au_role r on au.code = r.code where r.code in('verifier', 'verifier_admin')) and permission = 'PERM_AER_APPLICATION_VERIFICATION_VIEW_TASK';

rollback.sql: delete from au_role_permission where role_id in (select id from au_role where code in('verifier', 'verifier_admin')) and permission = 'PERM_AER_APPLICATION_VERIFICATION_EXECUTE_TASK';

changeSet.author: P44065
changeSet.sql: insert into au_authority_permission(id, authority_id, permission) select nextval('au_authority_permission_seq'), au.id, rp.permission from au_authority au join au_role r on au.code = r.code join au_role_permission rp on r.id = rp.role_id where r.code in('verifier', 'verifier_admin') and rp.permission = 'PERM_AER_APPLICATION_VERIFICATION_EXECUTE_TASK';

rollback.sql: delete from au_authority_permission where authority_id in (select au.id from au_authority au join au_role r on au.code = r.code where r.code in('verifier', 'verifier_admin')) and permission = 'PERM_AER_APPLICATION_VERIFICATION_EXECUTE_TASK';

changeSet.sql: insert into au_role_permission(id, role_id, permission) select nextval('au_role_permission_seq'), id, 'PERM_MANAGE_GUIDANCE' from au_role where code = 'ca_super_user';

rollback.sql: delete from au_role_permission where role_id in (select id from au_role where code = 'ca_super_user') and permission = 'PERM_MANAGE_GUIDANCE';

changeSet.author: dimopoulosc@unisystems.gr
changeSet.sql: insert into au_role_permission(id, role_id, permission) select nextval('au_role_permission_seq'), id, 'PERM_MANAGE_GUIDANCE' from au_role where code = 'service_super_user';

rollback.sql: delete from au_role_permission where role_id in (select id from au_role where code = 'service_super_user') and permission = 'PERM_MANAGE_GUIDANCE';

changeSet.author: p35066
changeSet.sql: insert into au_role (id, name, code, type) VALUES (nextval('au_role_seq'), 'Third party data provider', 'third_party_data_provider', 'THIRD_PARTY_DATA_PROVIDER');

changeSet.author: P44065

rollback.sql: delete from au_role_permission where permission = 'PERM_MANAGE_THIRD_PARTY_DATA_PROVIDERS';
